name: Great Grandma Mike's Pork (Fruit) Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 lb salt pork, ground and rinsed
2 pounds candied cherries, cut in half
20 each maraschino cherries, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
Makes 4 large loaves or 8 small loaves
Step One:
Cream together well:
1 lb of fat salt pork, ground and rinsed
1 cup lard
12 oz bottle of light molasses
1 lb of light brown sugar
Mix:
2 1/2 cups of hot water
2 heaping teaspoons baking soda
Mix with the above ingredients and cool.
Step Two:
Combine:
2 teaspoons baking powder
9 cups all-purpose flour (about)
1 teaspoon allspice
3 teaspoons cinnamon
2 teaspoons nutmeg
1/2 teaspoon cloves
2 teaspoons vanilla
Sift 9 cups of flour, then add the above ingredients and fold into the salt pork mixture after it is cooled.
Step Three:
Slice candied fruit into cubes:
2 pounds mixed candied fruit and peel
3 slices glazed pineapple
4 ounces lemon peel
4 ounces orange peel
4 ounces citron peel
1 pound golden raisins
1 pound seedless raisins (regular raisins)
1 pound currants
Soak raisins and currants in hot water, then drain well and squeeze out excess water.
Add:
1/2 pound candied cherries, cut in half
4 ounces dates, cut up
6 figs, cut up
20 maraschino cherries, cut in half
1 1/2 pounds walnuts, coarsely cut
1 pound pecans, coarsely cut
Bake at 325°F for about 1 1/2 hours (for small loaves) or 3 hours (for large loaves). Place a small pan of water on the bottom rack of the oven. Line the bread tins with aluminum foil and grease the foil well before adding the batter.
